---
title: "Use cases"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Use cases}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment   = "#>",
  warning   = FALSE,
  message   = FALSE,
  eval      = interactive()
)
```

This vignette answers the question *how do I use ggpaintr for my situation?* Companion vignettes cover tailoring defaults (`vignette("ggpaintr-customization")`), sharing safely (`vignette("ggpaintr-safety")`), real ggplot recipes (`vignette("ggpaintr-gallery")`), and LLM integration (`vignette("ggpaintr-llm")`).

## Formula tour

<!-- TODO: compact 5-placeholder table (var/text/num/expr/upload) + one worked example. Full grammar lives at ?ptr_app. -->

## L1 — All-in-one entry point

<!-- TODO:
- ptr_app() / ptr_app_bslib() / ptr_app_grid()
- empty-call cleanup by example
- local data with non-syntactic columns via ptr_normalize_column_names()
-->

## L2 — Embed in your own Shiny app

<!-- TODO:
- non-module path: ptr_controls_ui + ptr_outputs_ui + ptr_server
- module path: ptr_module_ui + ptr_module_server
- split outputs with ptr_register_plot / _code / _error
- ptr_init_state for advanced init
-->

## L3 — Custom rendering via extract accessors

<!-- TODO:
- ptr_extract_plot(state) inside renderPlotly() / renderGirafe() / custom renderer
- ptr_extract_code(state) for own code panel
- ptr_extract_error(state) for custom error UI
- ptr_gg_extra(state, ...) for host-app layer injection
- ALL examples are full running apps — no testServer
- cross-link gallery §6 (plotly/ggiraph) as canonical worked examples
-->
